since_last: 57% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +5.48%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 57% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.25% · BTC +0.69% · Gold +1.94% · Nasdaq100 -0.54%. 57% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +5.48%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +5.48%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.00%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: DV is the standout at +8.49%
cards.body: Leaders: DV +8.49%, NOW +8.19%, PUBM +8.08%, MGNI +7.51%, APP +7.27%. Laggards: TER -7.93%, HPE -6.95%, VRT -6.37%, LRCX -5.65%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.99% at $156.05
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.99% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
